audit_events_id_check.name: audit_events_id_check
audit_events_id_check.value: length("audit_events"."id") = 32 AND substr("audit_events"."id", 1, 6) = 'audit_' AND substr("audit_events"."id", 7, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("audit_events"."id", 7) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

audit_events_actor_check.name: audit_events_actor_check
audit_events_actor_check.value: ("audit_events"."actor_kind" = 'staff' AND "audit_events"."actor_id" IS NOT NULL AND "audit_events"."staff_role" IS NOT NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_operator_label" IS NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_user_id" IS NULL) OR ("audit_events"."actor_kind" = 'telegram_operator' AND "audit_events"."actor_id" IS NULL AND "audit_events"."staff_role" IS NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_operator_label" IS NOT NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_user_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("audit_events"."actor_kind" NOT IN ('staff', 'telegram_operator') AND "audit_events"."staff_role" IS NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_operator_label" IS NULL AND "audit_events"."telegram_user_id" IS NULL)

audit_events_staff_actor_id_check.name: audit_events_staff_actor_id_check
audit_events_staff_actor_id_check.value: "audit_events"."actor_kind" <> 'staff' OR (length("audit_events"."actor_id") = 32 AND substr("audit_events"."actor_id", 1, 6) = 'staff_' AND substr("audit_events"."actor_id", 7, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("audit_events"."actor_id", 7) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*')

audit_events_telegram_operator_check.name: audit_events_telegram_operator_check
audit_events_telegram_operator_check.value: "audit_events"."actor_kind" <> 'telegram_operator' OR ("audit_events"."telegram_operator_label" = trim("audit_events"."telegram_operator_label") AND length("audit_events"."telegram_operator_label") BETWEEN 1 AND 64 AND "audit_events"."telegram_user_id" > 0 AND "audit_events"."telegram_user_id" <= 9007199254740991)

audit_events_fact_length_check.name: audit_events_fact_length_check
audit_events_fact_length_check.value: length("audit_events"."action") BETWEEN 1 AND 64 AND length("audit_events"."entity_kind") BETWEEN 1 AND 64 AND length("audit_events"."entity_id") BETWEEN 1 AND 128

catalog_items_id_kind_check.name: catalog_items_id_kind_check
catalog_items_id_kind_check.value: ("catalog_items"."kind" = 'product' AND length("catalog_items"."id") = 34 AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 1, 8) = 'product_' AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 9, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 9) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*') OR ("catalog_items"."kind" = 'bundle' AND length("catalog_items"."id") = 33 AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 1, 7) = 'bundle_' AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 8, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("catalog_items"."id", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*')

customers_id_check.name: customers_id_check
customers_id_check.value: length("customers"."id") = 35 AND substr("customers"."id", 1, 9) = 'customer_' AND substr("customers"."id", 10, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("customers"."id", 10) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

idempotency_records_result_check.name: idempotency_records_result_check
idempotency_records_result_check.value: length("idempotency_records"."result_kind") BETWEEN 1 AND 64 AND length("idempotency_records"."result_id") BETWEEN 1 AND 128

inventory_entries_id_check.name: inventory_entries_id_check
inventory_entries_id_check.value: length("inventory_entries"."id") = 42 AND substr("inventory_entries"."id", 1, 16) = 'inventory_entry_' AND substr("inventory_entries"."id", 17, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("inventory_entries"."id", 17) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

inventory_reservations_id_check.name: inventory_reservations_id_check
inventory_reservations_id_check.value: length("inventory_reservations"."id") = 38 AND substr("inventory_reservations"."id", 1, 12) = 'reservation_' AND substr("inventory_reservations"."id", 13, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("inventory_reservations"."id", 13) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

skus_owner_check.name: skus_owner_check
skus_owner_check.value: ("skus"."owner_kind" = 'variant' AND "skus"."variant_id" IS NOT NULL AND "skus"."bundle_id" IS NULL) OR ("skus"."owner_kind" = 'bundle' AND "skus"."variant_id" IS NULL AND "skus"."bundle_id" IS NOT NULL)

staff_members_id_check.name: staff_members_id_check
staff_members_id_check.value: length("staff_members"."id") = 32 AND substr("staff_members"."id", 1, 6) = 'staff_' AND substr("staff_members"."id", 7, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("staff_members"."id", 7) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

staff_members_lifecycle_check.name: staff_members_lifecycle_check
staff_members_lifecycle_check.value: ("staff_members"."status" = 'pending' AND "staff_members"."approved_at" IS NULL AND "staff_members"."revoked_at" IS NULL) OR ("staff_members"."status" = 'active' AND "staff_members"."role" IS NOT NULL AND "staff_members"."approved_at" IS NOT NULL AND "staff_members"."revoked_at" IS NULL) OR ("staff_members"."status" = 'revoked' AND "staff_members"."approved_at" IS NOT NULL AND "staff_members"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL)

staff_members_lifecycle_order_check.name: staff_members_lifecycle_order_check
staff_members_lifecycle_order_check.value: "staff_members"."created_at" <= "staff_members"."updated_at" AND ("staff_members"."approved_at" IS NULL OR ("staff_members"."created_at" <= "staff_members"."approved_at" AND "staff_members"."approved_at" <= "staff_members"."updated_at")) AND ("staff_members"."revoked_at" IS NULL OR ("staff_members"."approved_at" <= "staff_members"."revoked_at" AND "staff_members"."revoked_at" <= "staff_members"."updated_at"))

staff_session_cleanup_debts_staff_id_che.name: staff_session_cleanup_debts_staff_id_check
staff_session_cleanup_debts_staff_id_che.value: length("staff_session_cleanup_debts"."staff_id") = 32 AND substr("staff_session_cleanup_debts"."staff_id", 1, 6) = 'staff_' AND substr("staff_session_cleanup_debts"."staff_id", 7, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("staff_session_cleanup_debts"."staff_id", 7) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

stock_items_id_check.name: stock_items_id_check
stock_items_id_check.value: length("stock_items"."id") = 37 AND substr("stock_items"."id", 1, 11) = 'stock_item_' AND substr("stock_items"."id", 12, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("stock_items"."id", 12) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'

variants_id_check.name: variants_id_check
variants_id_check.value: length("variants"."id") = 34 AND substr("variants"."id", 1, 8) = 'variant_' AND substr("variants"."id", 9, 1) GLOB '[0-7]' AND substr("variants"."id", 9) NOT GLOB '*[^0123456789abcdefghjkmnpqrstvwxyz]*'
